svg.title: Project 02 – OmniNode Infrastructure Manager Architecture
svg.desc: White and navy architecture diagram for OmniNode – Bitcoin + Ethereum, 9 containers, full observability.
svg.text: - Testnet syncs hours vs mainnet weeks
- Env var webhook handled in Flask
- digitalocean_firewall – 13 ports open, all outbound allowed
- digitalocean_ssh_key – SSH key for server access
- Start + enable Docker as systemd service
- UFW firewall – 13 port rules + default deny
ok=22 changed=15 unreachable=0 failed=0 · idempotent – safe to re-run
GitHub Actions · github/workflows/ci.yml · minikube local cluster
- CI green tick on all checks
- stop all – Graceful shutdown all containers
1 Check required tools (docker, git, curl, openssl)
2 Verify all 13 required ports are free
8 Health check Bitcoin RPC + Ethereum RPC + Lighthouse
10 Confirm Grafana reachable – print all access URLs
- Checks all 9 containers via Docker socket
- Queries Bitcoin RPC + Ethereum RPC + Lighthouse
- Last line of defence if Prometheus is down
- Auto-merged by Docker Compose on start
gitignored · blockchain data survives container restarts
All sourced from .env · No hardcoded values in docker-compose.yml
- :8332 Bitcoin RPC · :8333 Bitcoin P2P · :28332 Bitcoin ZMQ
- :8545 Geth RPC · :8546 Geth WebSocket · :30303 Ethereum P2P
- Bitcoin RPC unreachable · Severity: critical · Wait: 2m
- Geth RPC unreachable · Severity: critical · Wait: 2m
- Beacon API unreachable / Block height unchanged · Wait: 2m / 10m
- <3 peers connected / Disk usage >85% · Severity: warning / critical
Bitcoin Core · Geth · Lighthouse · Docker · Prometheus · Grafana · Alertmanager · Terraform · Ansible · Kubernetes · GitHub Actions
